title: Horizon Design System refresh
description: Redesigned 800+ utility icons for our design system refresh. Introduced a 20px to bridge the gap between our existing 16px and 24px to provide our designers with greater flexibility within our system.
Led unification of 200+ multi-colored icons across ServiceNow's Service Portal. Auditing use cases cross-functionally and built a design library to standardize patterns for further adoption.

My day to day involves managing ongoing icon production requests from cross-functional teams, maintaining design libraries for utility and colored tile icons, and executing animation requests to support product teams.

title: Lightstep Incident Response
description: Spearheaded visual experience as 1 of 2 design system focused product designers within the billion dollar ITSM portfolio, helping shape Lightstep Incident Response, an all-in-one DevOps/SRE platform that my team built 0→1.

Collaborated cross-functionally and externally with stakeholders such as PM's, accessibility, researchers, developers, and other product designers to make sure we were delivering experiences optimized for our target customer needs.
Lightstep reached 40+ clients following MVP launch in March 2022.

items.text: On-call flow custom components and specifications

title: Employee Slate
description: Established icon animation patterns for ServiceNow's AI product. Defined expression level standards by working with research to ensure each animation served a functional purpose to advance usability.

Delivered illustrations and design guidelines for ServiceNow's newest AI product. Explored and developed visual concepts to expand our visual language in the second phase of our design system refresh.
Contact for more details on this project

title: horizon.servicenow.com
description: Designed reusable illustration patterns, created animations for motion patterns and page headers, and set visual guidelines for our new design system site to enable consistent asset reproduction and implementation.
